description: New tools/evals/fixtures/gen.mjs: deterministic (seeded, no Date.now in output) generator producing tools/evals/fixtures/portfolio/ with 3 acme-* projects, ~40 bricks with manifests (mixed health: some gate violations, one theft-shaped duplicate pair for similarity tests), .smarch/ control-plane dirs. title: Deterministic fixture portfolio generator (acme-*)

acceptance_criteria: one real codex scenario runs end-to-end and produces a scored result
description: New tools/evals/run.mjs: scenario files tools/evals/scenarios/*.json ({packet, expected:{gate_outcomes, files_shape, forbidden}}), executed via tools/lib/workforce dispatch against the fixture portfolio in a temp worktree, scored 0-100 by rubric (gates passed, criteria met, forbidden surfaces untouched), trend appended to .UltraVision/meta or tools/evals/results/trend.jsonl. --selftest runs one scenario on the stub backend. Regressions in skill-tagged scenarios are release-blocking per 08-QUALITY-RELEASE-PLAN.
title: Agent-eval harness with scored scenarios
